scripts.test:contracts: node --test tests/admin-access-static.test.mjs tests/content-schema.test.mjs tests/content-schema-gate.test.mjs tests/protected-contracts.test.mjs tests/word-list-data.test.mjs
scripts.test:admin: node --test tests/admin-access-static.test.mjs tests/admin-claim-state.test.mjs tests/admin-cloud-api-static.test.mjs tests/admin-cloud-rank-behavior.test.mjs tests/admin-cloud-gate-static.test.mjs tests/admin-cloud-gate-behavior.test.mjs tests/admin-cloud-word-static.test.mjs tests/admin-route-static.test.mjs tests/admin-ui-static.test.mjs tests/admin-gate-ui-static.test.mjs tests/admin-word-ui-static.test.mjs tests/admin-word-pagination-static.test.mjs tests/admin-word-import.test.mjs tests/admin-word-import-ui-static.test.mjs tests/admin-staging-static.test.mjs
scripts.test:stage-a: npm run test:contracts && npm run test:rules
scripts.test:stage-b: npm run test:contracts && npm run test:admin && npm --prefix functions run check && npm --prefix functions test && npm run test:rules
scripts.test:stage-c1: npm run test:contracts && npm run test:admin && npm run test:admin:browser && npm --prefix functions run check && npm --prefix functions test && npm run test:rules
scripts.test:stage-c2: npm run test:contracts && npm run test:admin && npm run test:admin:browser && npm run test:admin:gate-browser && npm --prefix functions run check && npm --prefix functions test && npm run test:rules
